# Components

See [../components.md](../components.md) for the current shadcn-vue component inventory and file map.

## Guidance

- Use the inventory to choose the matching per-component guide before writing or updating shadcn docs.
- If a component is a thin wrapper over `reka-ui`, keep its terminology aligned with the matching `reka-ui/components/*.md` file.
- If shadcn-vue MCP is configured, use it to confirm registry file lists and dependencies before writing or updating a component guide.
- For special-case components like `chart`, `form`, `sidebar`, `sonner`, and deprecated `toast`, capture the exception explicitly instead of forcing them into the direct-wrapper template.
